response.objective_caption: A person stands in the foreground wearing a white crewneck sweatshirt with a rectangular logo displaying the letters NU on the left side of the chest. The individual is positioned outdoors at night beside a red brick wall with a dark window frame visible to the left. A second person appears partially behind the foreground figure, visible over the right shoulder. The background contains dark leafy trees and a building with illuminated windows.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person stands in the foreground wearing a white crewneck sweatshirt with a rectangular NU logo on the left chest, captured with harsh direct flash that creates bright specular highlights on the fabric and casts deep shadows across the face. The individual is positioned outdoors at night beside a red brick wall, presented in a casually framed snapshot with slight tilt and indifferent cropping that evokes unplanned vernacular energy. A second person peeks out from behind the right shoulder, partially visible in the awkward composition. Dark trees and building windows with interior illumination appear in the underexposed background.
